api.title: Dungeons & Dragons 5e 2024 Complete API
api.description: Comprehensive JSON-based API covering all aspects of D&D 5e 2024 character creation, rules systems, and gameplay mechanics
api.coverage: Complete character creation, equipment, spells, rules, and game systems

character_creation.description: Complete guide to creating D&D characters from preparation to finalization
includes: Preparation steps (DM discussion, Session Zero, character sheets)
5-step creation process (Class, Origin, Ability Scores, Alignment, Details)

character_sheet.description: Complete character sheet template mapping API data to standard D&D sheet format
includes: All character sheet sections and fields
Data mapping between API and sheet presentation
Calculated field formulas and validation rules

species.description: All playable species with traits, abilities, and cultural information

classes.description: All character classes with features, progression, and specializations

backgrounds.description: Character backgrounds providing skills, equipment, and narrative hooks

feats.description: Optional character abilities and specialized training

magic_items.description: Complete magic item system with identification, attunement, and usage rules

equipment.description: Comprehensive gear system including weapons, armor, tools, and magical items

spells.description: Complete spell system organized by class and level
spells.organization: Individual spell files with class-based organization
spells.coverage: All 2024 spells with mechanics, descriptions, and casting details

rules.description: Comprehensive game mechanics and rules systems
components: Basic game mechanics and rhythm of play
Dice mechanics and D20 test system

monsters.description: Complete monster stat blocks for encounters and adventures
monsters.cr_range: CR 0 to CR 10+ with tactical information and integration

schemas.description: JSON schemas for data validation and structure consistency
schemas.purpose: Ensure consistent data structure across all API components

origin_builder.description: Advanced system for creating custom backgrounds and species combinations

character_creation_workflow: 1. Review character-creation.json for complete creation process
8. Consider feats from feats/ (if using optional rules)
9. Use character-sheet.json template for data organization
api_navigation: Index files provide overviews and summaries

integration_points.character_to_rules: Classes and features reference rules for mechanics
integration_points.equipment_to_rules: Weapons and armor use combat and damage systems
integration_points.spells_to_rules: Spellcasting uses action economy and ability systems
integration_points.backgrounds_to_rules: Skills and proficiencies use ability and proficiency systems
integration_points.species_to_rules: Traits and abilities use core game mechanics
integration_points.feats_to_all: Feats can modify any aspect of character capabilities

completeness.species_options: Full 2024 roster with traits and variants
completeness.class_options: All classes with complete feature progressions
completeness.equipment_catalog: Complete gear system from basic to magical
completeness.spell_system: Full spellcasting with all spell levels and classes
completeness.rules_coverage: Core mechanics through advanced combat and conditions

api_philosophy.comprehensive: Cover all aspects of D&D 5e 2024 character creation and play
api_philosophy.modular: Separate systems that work together seamlessly
api_philosophy.consistent: Uniform data structures and organization patterns
api_philosophy.practical: Designed for actual gameplay and character creation use
api_philosophy.extensible: Structure supports future additions and modifications
